data.title: Impact of Terra's Collapse on Crypto Industry Accountability
data.description: According to Odaily, Zhu Su has commented on the aftermath of the LUNA collapse, highlighting the significant losses faced by investors and the limited calls for forgiveness towards Do Kwon. Terra, one of the largest protocols in crypto history, operated with transparency, and its stablecoin UST was widely adopted by major exchanges, with substantial involvement from top venture capitalists. However, the industry seems to attribute the failure to individual actions rather than systemic issues. Despite Do Kwon's arrogance during Terra's peak and his disregard for external criticism, using him as a scapegoat could deter high-potential entrepreneurs from entering the crypto space, similar to failures in traditional industries. Entrepreneurs now must weigh the risks of personal accountability when choosing between AI, early-stage technology, and the crypto sector. This situation is reminiscent of the debate over whether Ethereum co-founder Vitalik should have faced legal consequences following the DAO hack.

data.title: World Liberty Financial Completes $550 Million Community Funding
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Trump family's cryptocurrency initiative, World Liberty Financial, has successfully concluded its community public offering, raising a total of $550 million. This follows an additional funding round that was previously conducted.

data.title: Cango Announces $30 Million Stock Buyback Plan
data.description: According to PANews, Cango, a Bitcoin mining company listed on the New York Stock Exchange, has announced that its board of directors has approved a stock buyback plan. The company intends to repurchase up to $30 million worth of its issued American Depositary Shares (ADS) and Class A ordinary shares over the next 12 months, starting from April 25, 2025. As previously disclosed by Cango, the company's total Bitcoin holdings reached 1,944 units by the end of February.

data.title: A whale deposited 3.1 million USDC into HyperLiquid and set up a HYPE purchase order
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale has deposited 3.1 million USDC into HyperLiquid and set up a HYPE purchase order.

data.title: ​Users who pre-order the SuiPlay0X1 device will join an exclusive club of Eternal NFT holders
data.description:
According to SuiPlay official news, users who pre-order SuiPlay0X1 devices will join the exclusive club of Eternal NFT holders.
Benefits have already been distributed, including Pebble City's STBL airdrop, and more exciting surprises are about to be revealed.
Snapshots of future rewards may be distributed at any time - learn more about SuiPlay0X1 pre-order rewards https://blog.sui.io/suiplay0x1-preorder-rewards/?utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=play_beyond

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$143 million yesterday, and the ETF net asset ratio reached 5.62%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 13, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$143 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of US$45.7467 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$39.333 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a net outflow of US$75.48 million in a single day. Currently, FBTC has a historical net inflow of US$11.25 billion.

As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$89.605 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) reached 5.62%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$35.272 billion.
Information source: https://sosovalue.com/assets/etf

data.title: Zhu Su: Crypto industry holding founders accountable may hinder the entry of high-potential talents
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Zhu Su said that the collapse of LUNA caused heavy losses to many investors, so there is not much call for forgiveness for Do Kwon. As one of the largest protocols in the history of encryption, Terra's mechanism has always been open and transparent, UST is widely adopted by major exchanges, and top VCs are also deeply involved. However, now the industry seems to blame the failure on him personally rather than systemic problems.
Although Do Kwon was too arrogant at his peak and failed to fully listen to external criticism, if the crypto industry chooses to use him as a "scapegoat", it may affect the participation of high-potential entrepreneurs-after all, there are similar failure cases in traditional industries. Today, entrepreneurs need to consider the risk of "personal responsibility" when weighing between AI, early technology and the crypto industry. This phenomenon reminds people of the question of whether Ethereum co-founder Vitalik should bear criminal responsibility after the DAO hacking incident.

data.title: Tether Freezes Over $11 Million USDT Amid Phishing Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether has frozen $11 million USDT linked to a TRON address, THsPNvWc47swNQp2GmAoH96KtYfSR4bz9F, due to suspected phishing activities. Additionally, a UniswapV2Pair contract address (0x652d…89E) has also been frozen, involving 442,400 USDT.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF in the U.S. Sees Significant Outflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported a net outflow of $73.6 million from the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF yesterday.

data.title: ETH's early whale recharged 16,400 ETH to HTX, or made a profit of 13.1 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot On Chain monitoring, an ETH whale recharged 16,467 ETH (worth approximately $30.33 million) to HTX 8 hours ago after holding it for 4.25 years. The whale purchased 9,298 ETH from Binance, HTX, and Bitstamp on December 9, 2020 (at a cost of approximately $560), and 7,116 ETH from Coinbase on March 16, 2023 (at a cost of approximately $1,658). If the whale sells all ETH at $1,842, it is expected to make a profit of $13.1 million (+76%).
